title: feat: add quickstart showcasing workflow retry config
body:
See the retryConfig here https://github.com/dapr/dapr-agents/blob/main/tests/agents/durableagent/test_durable_agent.py#L1093-L1098

We need to add a quickstart showcasing the retryConfig.

Acceptance Criteria:
- quickstarts/durable_agent_retry.py created showcasing the retry config capabilities we support and is documented nicely within the readme for the quickstarts
- the integration tests for the quickstarts gets updated to run this as well

comments.body: Hey @sicoyle , i would like to work on this issue, can you assign this to me?
Hi @sicoyle, I would love to take this on! Could you assign it to me? I'll review the retryConfig in the tests and get started on the quickstart script.

Hi! I'm creating a few more good first issues — give me a few minutes pls 😄 I'll assign on a first-come, first-served basis to keep things fair. Assigning @ArokyaMatthew since I got your comment first. @Synaptara, a few more good first issues will be up shortly for you to pick from ❤️
No worries, @sicoyle! Thanks for the heads up, I'll keep my eyes peeled for the new ones. 👀

> Hi! I'm creating a few more good first issues — give me a few minutes pls 😄 I'll assign on a first-come, first-served basis to keep things fair.
